tasks.title: FabricChangeSource::watch() returns Err(StreamError::Unavailable)
tasks.detail: crates/fdb-realtime/src/lib.rs:116 — replace Ok(futures::stream::empty().boxed()) with Err(StreamError::Unavailable). Keep the tracing::warn! and the commented future impl. StreamError::Unavailable already exists at crates/fdb-ports/src/lib.rs:31.

tasks.title: Unit test: fabric adapter fails closed
tasks.detail: cargo test -p fdb-realtime — assert watch() yields Err(Unavailable), never Ok(empty).

tasks.title: Invert the default change source
tasks.detail: crates/fdb-gateway/src/main.rs:601 — select ListenChangeSource unless FLINT_CHANGE_SOURCE=fabric. Helm values.yaml:55 already pins 'listen' and must keep working.

tasks.title: Fix .env.example wording and default
tasks.detail: .env.example:58 falsely says LISTEN/NOTIFY replaces 'polling'. There is no polling — the alternative is an empty stream. Rewrite; reflect the new default.

tasks.title: Set FLINT_CHANGE_SOURCE in docker-compose
tasks.detail: Ensure the compose quickstart path yields working subscriptions.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG BREAKING entry
tasks.detail: Base Rule #16: operators explicitly using fabric now get an error instead of silence. Document it.

tasks.title: Integration: default path delivers a real event
tasks.detail: Depends on p16-c003 (green integration env). Insert a row, assert the subscriber receives it. Verify manually against local Postgres if CI is not yet green.
